intro: Dealing with aggressive wasps around your Greenburgh property? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional wasp removal services throughout Westchester County, including all Greenburgh neighborhoods. Our licensed technicians safely eliminate wasp nests from residential and commercial properties, with pricing ranging from $350 to $550 depending on nest location and severity.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Greenburgh and surrounding Westchester communities with safe, effective wasp removal solutions. Our certified technicians use eco-friendly treatments and provide same-day or next-day service to protect your family and property from dangerous stings.
localContext: Greenburgh's mix of historic homes, modern developments like Edgemont and Hartsdale, and wooded areas near the Greenburgh Nature Center create ideal conditions for wasp nesting. From vintage properties near Central Avenue to newer construction in Fairview, our team understands the unique pest challenges facing Greenburgh residents and businesses.

faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Greenburgh?
faqs.answer: Wasp removal in Greenburgh typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the nest size, location accessibility, and the type of wasps involved. Ground nests and easily accessible areas are usually on the lower end, while high exterior walls or attic nests may require specialized equipment and fall on the higher end of our pricing range.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Greenburgh?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day wasp removal service throughout Greenburgh and Westchester County. Our technicians understand that wasp infestations pose immediate safety risks, especially for children and those with allergies, so we prioritize emergency calls and typically arrive within 24 hours of your initial contact.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Greenburgh, NY?
faqs.answer: Greenburgh residents most commonly encounter yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. Yellow jackets often build ground nests in yards and parks, paper wasps create umbrella-shaped nests under eaves and porches, and bald-faced hornets construct large, enclosed nests in trees and on building exteriors. All three species can be aggressive when defending their nests.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our wasp removal process is completely safe for your family and pets. We use EPA-approved treatments and follow strict safety protocols during removal. Our technicians will advise you to keep family members and pets indoors during the treatment process, and the area is typically safe to use again within a few hours after service completion.
